LanguageData.RWR_Setting_EnableRetreatOnSuccess: Raiders retreat after achieving their objective
LanguageData.RWR_Setting_ChaoticRaidChance: Chance a raid ignores goals and attacks randomly (0 = all raids have purpose): {0}
LanguageData.RWR_Setting_NegotiatorCooldownDays: Min days between negotiators from same faction: {0}
LanguageData.RWR_DemandExpiredText: Your failure to comply with the demands of {0} has provoked a raid.
LanguageData.RWR_DemandFulfilledText: You have fulfilled the demands of {0}. Your relationship with them has improved by {1} goodwill.
LanguageData.RWR_RetaliationQuestDesc: Having refused the demands of {0}, they are preparing a retaliatory raid.\n\nEstimated arrival: {1}
LanguageData.RWR_NegotiationQuestRequirePawn: Right-click the negotiator to release prisoner {0}
LanguageData.RWR_RaidGoalRetreatYes: If the raiders achieve their objective they will retreat — stopping them before that will send them fleeing.
LanguageData.RWR_RaidGoalRetreatNo: The raiders will not retreat even if they achieve their goal. Expect a sustained assault.
LanguageData.RWR_NegotiatorArrivalLetterText:
A negotiator from {0} has arrived at your colony's border.

Their demand: {1} ({2}).

You have {3} days to comply. Refusing or ignoring them will provoke a retaliatory raid within 1–4 days.
LanguageData.RWR_DemandFailNotEnough: You no longer have enough {0} to fulfill this demand. (Required: {1}, Available: {2})
LanguageData.RWR_DemandConfirmDeliver: Instantly deliver {0} {1} from your stockpiles to {2}?
LanguageData.RWR_MessageDeliveredSuccessfully: Successfully delivered {0} {1} to the negotiator. They are departing peacefully.
LanguageData.RWR_MessageConsumeError: Internal error: Could only find {0} {1} during consumption.
LanguageData.RWR_DemandPrisonerUnavailable: The required prisoner is no longer available. You must refuse or ignore the demand.
LanguageData.RWR_DemandConfirmHandover: Instantly hand over {0} and release them to {1}?
LanguageData.RWR_DemandConfirmQuest: Deliver {0} to {1}?\n\nA compliance timer will begin. Failure to deliver will still trigger a raid.
LanguageData.RWR_RefusedDemandLetterText: The negotiator from {0} has left, but they will return.
LanguageData.RWR_MessageGuardKilled: A guard from {0} was killed. The negotiator is departing and the compliance deadline has been halved.
LanguageData.RWR_MessagePaymentDelivered: Payment delivered. The negotiator is satisfied.
LanguageData.RWR_MenuOptionPrisonerUnavailable: Required prisoner is no longer available
LanguageData.RWR_MessagePrisonerHandedOver: {0} has been handed over and released.
LanguageData.RWR_MessageNegotiatorMurdered: Negotiator murdered! {0} is launching an immediate retaliatory strike!
LanguageData.RWR_MessageNegotiatorHarmed: Negotiator harmed! {0} is launching a retaliatory strike!
LanguageData.RWR_MessageRoutedRetaliation: The forces of {0} have been routed. Expect retaliation.
LanguageData.RWR_PostRaidOutcomeFailure: The raiders of {0} were driven off before achieving their objective.
LanguageData.RWR_GoalSuccessDescLoot: {0} has seized {1} and is withdrawing from your colony.
LanguageData.RWR_GoalSuccessDescDestroy: {0} has destroyed your {1} and is withdrawing.
LanguageData.RWR_GoalSuccessDescRevenge: {0} has made an example of {1} and is withdrawing.
LanguageData.RWR_GoalSuccessDescGeneric: {0} has achieved their objective and is withdrawing.
LanguageData.RWR_AlertNegotiatorPresentDesc: One or more negotiators from another faction are waiting at your borders. You should talk to them or consider their demands before they lose patience.
